name: filter
label: Filter (encoded query)
description: Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true^priority<=2'.

name: categoryField
label: Category field (x-axis)
description: Field to group by for the x-axis categories, e.g. 'priority'.

name: seriesField
label: Series field (optional split)
description: Optional second field to split into multiple series, e.g. 'state'. Blank = a single series.

name: metric
label: Metric
description: Aggregation: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.

name: valueField
label: Value field
description: Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count'), e.g. 'business_duration'.

name: seriesName
label: Series name (single-series)
description: Name for the single series when no Series field is set. Default = the metric label.

name: useDisplayValue
label: Use display values for labels
description: Group/label by display value (readable) instead of raw value.

name: colors
label: Colors (JSON)
description: Optional per-series colors: a JSON array ["#2E93fA","#66DA26"] applied by order, or a map {"Resolved":"#66DA26"} keyed by series name.

name: maxCategories
label: Max categories (top-N)
description: Optional limit: keep only the top-N categories by total value. Blank = all.

name: sort
label: Category sort
description: Order categories: none (query order), label-asc, label-desc, value-asc, value-desc.
